summary: GOVERNANCE & RELIABILITY PROTOCOL - Rule 1: Absolute Path Verification for CWD. Rule 2: End-to-End Handshake Duty (frontend + backend tests required). Rule 3: Pure State Integrity (no side effects in React state, decouple logic from render loop). Rule 4: Zero-Fluff Technical Fidelity. Rule 5: Payload Purity (fuzzy-match manuscript sections).
